TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tajikistan, title = Tajikistan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tajikistan} }

S.FORM: Tajikistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 39 00 N, 71 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 144,100 sq km (maki' tay 96ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 141,510 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 2,590 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 8,330,946. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 34.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 2.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 62.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Dushanbe. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 9 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Emomali Rahmon, aring ryax 16 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 1994 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Tajikistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 39 00 N, 71 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 144,100 sq km (maki' tay 96ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 141,510 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 2,590 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 8,330,946. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 34.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 2.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 62.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Dushanbe. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 9 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Emomali Rahmon, aring ryax 16 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 1994 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: tajikis~…ētan ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a *us~…ēńßanő≤e. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mqiru Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a emomali rańßmon, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
